strengths: The code has been refactored to improve readability, and the validation logic has been extracted into a separate function.

improvements: Consider breaking down the handleSubmit function into smaller, more manageable pieces to reduce its complexity score. For example, you could extract the API call into a separate function to make the code easier to read and test.
